description: Example of switchboard remediation and compliance bringing vintage installations to AS/NZS 3000:2018 standards
sample:
# Main Switchboard Remediation

## Scope
- Complete isolation and tagging out of the existing residential/commercial mains
- Removal of asbestos-backing panel board and redundant ceramic fuse holders
- Supply and installation of a surface-mount 24-way metal enclosure
- Installation of NHP RCBO circuit breakers for all final subcircuits
- Re-testing of earth continuity and insulation resistance prior to re-energisation

## Compliance
- All works executed in absolute conformity with AS/NZS 3000:2018 (Wiring Rules)
- Electrical Safety Certificate provided upon completion
